title: helichrysum calocephalum
intro: Helichrysum calocephalum, also known as Yellow Everlasting, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to Australia. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Helichrysum calocephalum include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing, as well as its potential to alleviate anxiety and improve mood. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
